subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of that radiant candle of supreme martyrdom! A letter from thee was received and its contents were noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن شمع روشن شهادت کبری مکتوبی از شما رسید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @naming of children; of individuals
